calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-02-2024 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-02-2024 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: The matter came on calendar for a short cause trial sent forthwith from Department 206.

Dept.505: Judge: Harry L. Jacobs; Clerk: K. Valdes; Bailiffs: Deputy Pliego and Deputy Jones; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:15:35 a.m. and concluding at 10:28:14 a.m.(D505)

Stanley Riddle, Esq. representing Plaintiff Alok Mengrajani who was placed under oath and testified.
Defendant Geoffrey Trotter not appearing.
Defendant Hana Ahmed not appearing.

Plaintiff's complaint for damages filed on April 25, 2023.
Proof of substituted service as to Defendant Hana Ahmed mailed Apr-28-2023; service effectuated on May-08-2023.
Proof of personal service as to Defendant Geoffrey Trotter served on Apr-26-2023.
Answer filed by Defendant Geoffrey Trotter and Defendant Hana Ahmed on Jun-14-2023.
Notice of time and place of trial filed and served by mail on Sep-13-2023.

Counsel to proceed by offer of proof.
Counsel examines plaintiff. Plaintiff testifies.

The Plaintiff submits the following exhibit/s for the Court 's review:
Exhibit 1: Declaration of Daniel Bornstein, Esq.
Exhibit 2: Declarations
Exhibit 3: Lease Agreement

The Court grants the request for judgment against Defendant Geoffrey Trotter and Defendant Hana Ahmed as follows:

The Plaintiff shall recover from the defendants the following:
Damages $70,624.00
Interest $6,473.86
Attorney's Fees $2,825.00
Costs $615.00

Total Judgment of $80,537.86

Proposed order signed by the Court.

Counsel to submit memo of cost to the Court.

Parties stipulate to the return of the exhibits.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-13-2023 Set For Trial On Apr-02-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion To Compel Responses From Geoffrey Trotter To Form Interrogatories; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support

No appearances in this matter.

The court adopts its tentative ruling: The unopposed motion is granted. Sanctions against Trotter on all motions against him is $750.
